summary: Application Security professional with 3+ years of experience across web, API, and mobile penetration testing. 100+ assessments at Indusface for banking and financial clients, 15+ assessments at Cubic Telecom (Dublin), and government security work at Maharashtra Cyber Cell. MSc Cybersecurity (NCI Dublin, 2:1). CEH and CAP certified. Nokia and Government of India Hall of Fame recognition for responsible vulnerability disclosure. Authorised to work in Ireland (Stamp 1G).

experience.title: Associate Security Engineer (Contract)
highlights: Conducted 15+ web application and API security assessments using Burp Suite Pro and OWASP methodology, identifying critical vulnerabilities including IDOR, Broken Access Control, and injection flaws
Performed SAST analysis using Semgrep and SonarQube on source code repositories, reducing false-positive rate through custom rule tuning
Delivered detailed security assessment reports with CVSS-scored findings and actionable remediation recommendations to development and engineering teams
Contributed to vulnerability management lifecycle — triaging, prioritising, and tracking remediation of 45+ total security findings across multiple applications
Supported DevSecOps pipeline integration by embedding SAST tooling into CI/CD workflows
experience.note: Most recent professional AppSec experience in Dublin

experience.title: Associate Information Security Analyst
highlights: Executed 100+ vulnerability assessments and penetration tests across web, API, and mobile applications for diverse clients including major financial institutions
Led end-to-end application security engagements for India's top-tier banking clients, ensuring PCI-DSS and regulatory compliance
Identified and validated security vulnerabilities including authentication bypasses, IDOR, injection flaws, and broken access control using OWASP Top 10 methodology
Delivered comprehensive security assessment reports with CVSS-scored findings, risk ratings, and prioritised remediation recommendations
Conducted security research on emerging attack vectors and CVEs to maintain up-to-date exploitation knowledge
experience.note: 1 year 8 months of professional AppSec experience

experience.title: Cyber Security Analyst
highlights: Performed security assessments on government web applications using manual and automated testing methodologies
Assisted in high-profile cybercrime investigations, applying digital forensics and incident response techniques
Collaborated with law enforcement agencies on cybercrime cases, providing technical expertise in digital evidence analysis
Contributed to vulnerability reporting and responsible disclosure processes

projects.name: AI-Powered Penetration Testing Home Lab
projects.description: Built a home lab integrating Penligent AI with DVWA to simulate and automate penetration testing workflows, documented in a Medium blog post

projects.name: ISO 27001 Gap Assessment Template
projects.description: Comprehensive ISO 27001 Gap Assessment Template covering all Annex A controls, designed for Irish SME environments with DORA and NIS2 alignment

projects.name: Risk Assessment Framework for SMEs
projects.description: Structured Risk Assessment Framework for SMEs incorporating DORA and NIS2 compliance requirements for Irish financial and critical infrastructure sectors

strengths: Clear written and verbal communication through security reports, Medium blog, and client-facing presentations
Strong analytical thinking across 45+ security assessments and responsible disclosure processes
Professional technical writing — pentest reports, GRC templates, published blog content
Adaptability — relocated from India to Ireland, completed MSc while building cybersecurity career
Continuous learning — AI security, GRC frameworks, offensive security certifications
